diff_text:
--- a/utils.py
+++ b/utils.py
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@
 def get_users(ids):
     results = []
-    for i in range(len(ids)):
+    for i in range(len(ids) - 1):
         results.append(db.fetch(ids[i]))
     return results

gold_annotations.issue: Off-by-one: range(len(ids)-1) skips the last element.
